languages.text: "Зачем вы это сделали, Камилла? Человек Гапраков должен был помочь, привести армию!"

traits.locale_text: "Зачем вы это сделали, Камилла? Человек Гапраков должен был помочь, привести армию!"

languages.text: "Why did you do it, Camilla? The Gapraks' man was supposed to help, to bring an army!"
languages.original_text: "Зачем вы это сделали, Камилла? Человек Гапраков должен был помочь, привести армию!"

traits.locale_text: "Why did you do it, Camilla? The Gapraks' man was supposed to help, to bring an army!"
"Why did you do it, Camilla? The Gapraks' man was supposed to help, to bring an army!"
"Why did you do it, Camilla? The Gapraks' man was supposed to help, to bring an army!"

languages.text: “你为什么要这么做，卡米拉？贾帕克家的人本该带着军队来支援我们！”
languages.original_text: "Why did you do it, Camilla? The Gapraks' man was supposed to help, to bring an army!"

traits.locale_text: “你为什么要这么做，卡米拉？贾帕克家的人本该带着军队来支援我们！”

languages.text: « Pourquoi avez-vous fait assassiner cet homme, Camilla ? Il était censé amener une armée à votre aide ! »
languages.original_text: "Why did you do it, Camilla? The Gapraks' man was supposed to help, to bring an army!"

traits.locale_text: « Pourquoi avez-vous fait assassiner cet homme, Camilla ? Il était censé amener une armée à votre aide ! »

languages.text: "Bunu neden yaptın Camilla? Gaprakların adamının yardım etmesi, ordu getirmesi gerekiyordu!"
languages.original_text: "Why did you do it, Camilla? The Gapraks' man was supposed to help, to bring an army!"

traits.locale_text: "Bunu neden yaptın Camilla? Gaprakların adamının yardım etmesi, ordu getirmesi gerekiyordu!"

languages.text: «¿Por qué lo ha hecho, Camilla? ¡El enviado de los Gaprak venía a ayudar, a traer un ejército!».
languages.original_text: "Why did you do it, Camilla? The Gapraks' man was supposed to help, to bring an army!"

traits.locale_text: «¿Por qué lo ha hecho, Camilla? ¡El enviado de los Gaprak venía a ayudar, a traer un ejército!».

languages.text: "Warum habt Ihr es getan, Camilla? Der Mann der Gaprak sollte helfen, mit einer Armee!"
languages.original_text: "Why did you do it, Camilla? The Gapraks' man was supposed to help, to bring an army!"

traits.locale_text: "Warum habt Ihr es getan, Camilla? Der Mann der Gaprak sollte helfen, mit einer Armee!"

languages.text: 「なぜ、カミラ？ギャプラクスの男は助けに来て、軍隊を連れてくるはずだったのに！」
languages.original_text: "Why did you do it, Camilla? The Gapraks' man was supposed to help, to bring an army!"

traits.locale_text: 「なぜ、カミラ？ギャプラクスの男は助けに来て、軍隊を連れてくるはずだったのに！」
